MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER CALVIN MAYS' HEARING ON PETITION.

Appearances: Calvin Mays, Jr. (707.428.5011) petitioner and moving party appearing in propria persona; Wilfred T. Fong of the Office of the Attorney General (510.622.2255) appearing via Court Call for Respondent and opposing party.

Discussed and the Court rules as follows: Continued to December 3, 2013. Petitioner may file and serve a reply to the opposition, which can include new evidence, by November 12, 2013. Respondent to file and serve a reply by November 20, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR #6185 (302/MJM)
